news.t: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of BCGS ETF with Bancreek Capital Advisors

holdings.infoBox: BCGS is an equity ETF with a total of 57 individual holdings. The top holdings are Carpenter Technology stock at 2.21%, Unipol Assicurazioni at 2.13%, Brinker International at 2.11%, BPER Banca SpA at 2.07%, and InterDigital at 2.07%.

overview.description: The Bancreek Global Select ETF (BCGS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund holds common stock and convertible securities of large-cap companies economically tied to the US and non-US developed markets, and to an extent, to the emerging markets. It uses a proprietary quantitative framework to select securities with the aim of long-term capital growth. BCGS was launched on Mar 9, 2026 and is issued by Bancreek.

data.title: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of BCGS ETF with Bancreek Capital Advisors
data.text: OKLAHOMA CITY, March 9, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Exchange Traded Concepts is pleased to announce the launch of the Bancreek Global Select ETF (NYSE: BCGS). The Fund began trading on the New York Stock Exc...
